title: Mentor Guide — Day 9 — FEC Validation Lab™
coachingObjective: Coach squads through evidence-based FEC validation — review and approve, never re-enter data.

timing.preSession: Check squad interview count (target 9) in mentor dashboard
timing.duringSession: Circulate during FEC Validation Lab steps

discussionQuestions: Which customer quotes drove the biggest FEC change?
Did the UVP stress test reveal assumptions that failed?
Who holds Research Lead, FEC Lead, and Pitch Lead roles?
coachingTips: Push squads to edit AI drafts — approval is not passive
Celebrate UVP Version 2 when evidence supports revision
Confirm portfolio auto-sync after each step
warningSigns: Squad approving steps with fewer than 6 encoded interviews
Duplicate pitch encoding outside SPIKE Studio
reflectionPrompts: What did validation teach you about your customer segment?
expectedOutcomes: AI pitch structure ready for Friday

activityCoachingNotes.notes: Six progressive unlock steps. Squad state syncs across devices on login.

debriefWithFaculty: Which squads are pitch-ready for Friday?
Any squads blocked on interview count?
